pages.title: Romans 6 — Reckoning
pages.desc: Dead to sin, alive to God — not by effort, but by position.

pages.desc: Not a ritual for the living — a burial for the already dead.

pages.desc: Why Paul was so alarmed — and what the Galatians were actually doing.

pages.title: All Things Work Together for Good
pages.desc: What "good" actually means — and what it doesn't.

pages.title: To Will Is Present with Me
pages.desc: The wretched man — and why Romans 7 is not the end of the story.

pages.title: The Two Adams
pages.desc: Two representative heads. Two inheritances. Not by effort — by birth.

pages.title: The Vine and the Branches
pages.desc: A branch does not try to abide — it simply remains.

pages.title: Agape
pages.desc: Love from a different source — not human affection, but God's own nature.

pages.title: What Faith Actually Is
pages.desc: Not hoping harder — substantiating what God has already accomplished.

pages.title: God and Mammon
pages.desc: You cannot serve two masters — and the old life cannot let go of either.

pages.title: God's Eternal Purpose
pages.desc: Before the foundation of the world — what God was after.

pages.title: The Mystery
pages.desc: Christ in you — the mystery hidden for ages.

pages.title: The Ultimate Intention
pages.desc: God's intention before, through, and beyond the fall.

pages.title: His Inheritance in the Saints
pages.desc: We ask what we inherit from God — but what does God inherit from us?

pages.title: The Image of God
pages.desc: Representative and shadow — a twofold calling held in balance only in Christ.

pages.title: Where You Begin
pages.desc: Four starting points — and why only the most ultimate one holds.

pages.title: The Kingdom of God
pages.desc: Not a place — a reign. Not future only — present and coming.

pages.title: Final Judgment
pages.desc: Torment or destruction — and what Scripture means by death.

pages.title: Your Sins I Remember No More
pages.desc: 93 years of bondage — blotted out of God's count. The arithmetic of grace.

pages.title: Children, Young Men, Fathers
pages.desc: Three stages — and what marks each one.

pages.title: Two Operating Systems
pages.desc: The flesh and the Spirit — two systems, one choice.

pages.title: Soul vs Spirit
pages.desc: The division Scripture makes — and why it matters.

pages.title: Three Kinds of Man
pages.desc: Natural, carnal, spiritual — Paul's three categories.

pages.title: Add-On vs Operating System
pages.desc: Christ as addition to your life — or Christ as your life.

pages.title: The School of Christ
pages.desc: Not learning about Christ — learning Christ Himself.

pages.title: The Head and the Body
pages.desc: Christ as actual head — every member functioning, none expendable.

pages.title: Gifts, Roles, and the Ekklesia
pages.desc: How the Spirit distributes gifts — and how the body was meant to function.

pages.title: The Segregated Church vs the Ekklesia
pages.desc: The NT knows nothing of a church sorted by age — only a family growing together.
